hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push)'; then echo 'Running ruff lint check before git operation...' >&2; RUFF=$(command -v ruff || echo '/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/bin/ruff'); "$RUFF" check pepperbot/ || exit 2; fi
